title: Story Mode OST
description: Replaces all songs (including discs) with MCSM songs while fitting the vibe. Nether songs go in the nether, eerie songs go in the end, etc. Over 70+ different songs.
body:
## Please read all the Description

### From 1.19.4 and newer i highly recommend downloading this mod so music discs dont stop: https://modrinth.com/mod/jukebox-custom-disc-fix

---Credits to Antimo & Welles for making the most beatiful yet criminally underrated music. Every song is originally made by them.

---Credits to ANADEL for helping in some songs with Antimo & Welles.

---Credits to Antimo, AsteroidBK and qwertyey for providing me the music in Khinsider.

### Note: I know the musicpack is heavy but dont worry, it wont affect performance at all, i know because i use this pack in a 4gb RAM laptop and i cant see the difference between not having it and having it.

### This pack is gonna have exclusive extended versions of some songs but feel free to share.


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

## Where songs play: 
* Menu: No More Creepers (Instrumental), Ivor Theme, Make It

* Overworld (Low Biome Dependence, Some songs may also play in the Menu screen):: Theme (Reprise, Unused), Milo, Reuben (Extended version), Pale Blue Dot, Map Room, Redstonia Freewalk, Dome of Concentration, Skyland, Harper, Boot Up, Beacontown Outskirts, Bad Luck Alley, Beacontown Freewalk, Automatic Chicken Farm, Wonderland Theme, Old Friends, Jungle Biome, Milo, Just Kids, Cave, Soren Theme, Oak, Lapis Lazuli, Zoom (Unreleased Instrumental Version), Order Hall, Order of the Stone, Land! (Unreleased deleted and Archived), Wonderland Puzzles, Sword Build, Badlands, Harper's Signal (Unreleased), The Finishing Blow

* Overworld (High Biome Dependence):: Library (Deep Dark), Abandoned Mineshaft (Dripstone Caves and Deep Dark), Badlands (Badlands (duh)), Cave, Cave of Wonders (Dripstone Caves, Grove, Jagged Peaks, Stony Peaks), Xara (Swamp), Bowie Wallow (Swamp), That's the Spirit! (Swamp), Order Hall (Underwater), Underwater Temple (Underwater), Sea Temple Treasure Room (Underwater).

* Creative::  Automatic Chicken Farm, Ocelot Mob, Jesse and Reuben, Theme (Reprise, Unused), Stone by Stone, Training Montage.


* Nether:: Magnus Theme, The Old Builders, Admin Wonderland, The Nether, Red Crosses (Soulsand Valley), Ivor in the Underneath (Nether Wastes), Inside the Tower (Crimson Forest).


* The End:: Dark Sky, Wither Storm Theme (Ender Dragon), No More Creepers Vocal version (End Credits)


* Music Discs:: Access Denied (Blocks), Command Block (Cat), Further Back (Chirp), Prismarine Mobs (Creator), Wandering Star (Creator Music Box), Detective Jesse (Far), Endercon DJ (Lava Chicken), Harper's Lab (Mall), Redstone Baby (Mellohi), Stone by Stone (Otherside), Blaze Rods (Pigstep), Gold Protocol (Precipice), Repeater (Relic), Ocelot Mob (Stal), Beacontown Victory (Strad), Mob Grinder (Tears), 101 Credits (Wait), Boomtown Suite (Ward), Wither Storm Theme Complete Version (5), Spiders! (11), Darkness (13) 

</details>

### Note: This is from the newer version, the older versions one has some slight differences, maybe some songs play in different biomes, for example.



## Pages where i got the music from:

-https://downloads.khinsider.com/game-soundtracks/album/minecraft-story-mode-gamerip-2016

-https://downloads.khinsider.com/game-soundtracks/album/minecraft-story-mode-season-2-original-soundtrack

-https://downloads.khinsider.com/game-soundtracks/album/minecraft-story-mode-original-soundtrack-2017-2023 [Most of the songs are from here]


## Try my pvpmusic mod:

* https://modrinth.com/mod/pvp-music
